title: Modify papr scripts to get better insight into failures
body:
As recommended by @jlebon in https://github.com/projectatomic/papr/issues/101

Should help to debug our timeout-after-clean-exit issues

comments.body: @jlebon I added the journal artifact as you suggested - but it doesn't seem to be firing (see CAH smoketested). This seems to mean that the container runtime is returning cleanly?

> This seems to mean that the container runtime is returning cleanly?

Yeah, I think you're right. Will take a closer look.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 4073541) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I think we're set to close this
